positive: An abstract, minimalist representation of a mystical forest clearing. The scene features bioluminescent flora and fauna forming intricate, stylized silhouettes against a deep, midnight indigo background. Focus on geometric patterns and graceful lines, suggesting roots, glowing orbs, and stylized woodland creatures (deer, foxes) in perfect, crisp black silhouettes. The mood is ethereal and magical, with splashes of neon cyan, lime green, and soft lavender providing strong, high-contrast accents. The overall composition should be centrally framed, perfect for a t-shirt print, with clean edges and a bold, graphic feel. Studio quality, high contrast, vector illustration style, flat graphic design.
